---
title: "STAT 301 Project"
author: "Mike Slathar"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(car)
```


## Testing if social media platform and gender either interact or one/both have an effect on daily social media hours 
```{r}
mediamodel<- lm(daily_social_media_hours~gender+platform_usage+gender*platform_usage, data= Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset)
Anova(mediamodel, type="II")
```

## Converting daily social media hours into a categorical variable with levels based on column mean and sd 
```{r}
m  = mean(Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$daily_social_media_hours, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_val = sd(Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$daily_social_media_hours, na.rm = TRUE)

Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$daily_screen_time_levels = cut(
  Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$daily_social_media_hours,
  breaks = c(-Inf, m - sd_val, m + sd_val, Inf),
  labels = c("low", "average", "high")
)

Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$daily_screen_time_levels= factor(Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$daily_screen_time_levels, levels = c("low", "average", "high"), ordered = TRUE)
```

## converting screen_time_before_sleep into categorical variables based on column mean and sd
```{r}
m1  = mean(Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$screen_time_before_sleep, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_val1 = sd(Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$screen_time_before_sleep, na.rm = TRUE)

Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$screen_time_before_sleep_levels = cut(
  Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$screen_time_before_sleep,
  breaks = c(-Inf, m1 - sd_val1, m1 + sd_val1, Inf),
  labels = c("low", "average", "high")
)

Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$screen_time_before_sleep_levels = factor(Teen_Mental_Health_Dataset$screen_time_before_sleep_levels, levels = c("low", "average", "high"), ordered = TRUE)
```
